name: ISCHEMIC HEART DISEASE
definition: CORONARY ARTERY DISEASE (CAD) myocardial scar / severe myocardial ischemia perfusion abnormality on poststress images normalizes on resting images 20-30% improvement in regional activity using a reference profile (= database normalized to specific gender, band of pixels with negative counts around hot objects during SPECT

demographics.Incidence: 1.5 million annually; leading cause of death in industrial nations

dominant_finding: pulmonary venous hypertension following acute infarction (40%)
distribution: marked variability in LV tracer uptake of inferior wall (diaphragmatic
discriminating_features: pulmonary venous hypertension following acute infarction (40%)
